title: ONX 19
body:
A custom modpack made for the simple Minecrafter: true to vanilla; enhances playability; quality of life, performance, and small tweak mods only.

In this modpack, you will experience dramatically increased performance thanks to:
- Sodium
- Starlight
- Lithium

Enhanced visuals thanks to:
- Iris Shaders

Small quality of life changes:
- Extra Sounds

And small tweaks courtesy of:
- Mouse Tweaks
